zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Bushnell於1524年出生在英國波克夏提勒爾斯特時，他的父親John Bushnell Sr32歲，母親Alice Klingham30歲。他於1520年與Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm)在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他去世於1593年1月19日在英國波克夏塔其哈姆享年69歲，埋葬在英國波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Bushnell于1524年出生在英国波克夏提勒爾斯特时，他的父亲John Bushnell Sr32岁，母亲Alice Klingham30岁。他于1520年与Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm)在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他去世于1593年1月19日在英国波克夏塔其哈姆享年69岁，埋葬在英国波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Bushnell was born in 1524, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, his father, John Bushnell Sr, was 32 and his mother, Alice Klingham, was 30. He married Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm) in 1520, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 19 January 1593, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, England.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm) en 1520, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 19 janvier 1593, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Bushnell(이)가 1524년 영국 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bushnell Sr(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Klingham(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm)(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1593년 1월 19일 영국 버크실르 댓챔에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 댓챔 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm) em 1520, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1593, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Bushnell родился в 1524 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Bushnell Sr было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Klingham, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Knapp (13ggm) в 1520 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 19 января 1593 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, тачам, биркшир, Англия.
